channel.title: CTF on Hexomedine
channel.description: Recent content in CTF on Hexomedine

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] Misc - White Rabbit
item.description: The CTF The Root-Me 10k CTF was organized to celebrate the 10k members on the discord of Root-Me. It was a fun CTF with interesting challenges. The categories were : OSINT, Misc, Web, Forensic, Pwn, Reverse, Programming, Intro and Crypto. I managed to get to the 18th place. The challenge In this challenge, we had to exploit a discord bot. In fact, there was an OS command injection in the bot.

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] OSINT - Find Our Roots
item.description: The CTF The Root-Me 10k CTF was organized to celebrate the 10k members on the discord of Root-Me. It was a fun CTF with interesting challenges. The categories were : OSINT, Misc, Web, Forensic, Pwn, Reverse, Programming, Intro and Crypto. I managed to get to the 18th place. The challenge The OSINT challenge was to find the name and the call sign of the boat on the picture below. Here’s the description of the challenge :

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] Web - CVE Finder Engine
item.description: The CTF The Root-Me 10k CTF was organized to celebrate the 10k members on the discord of Root-Me. It was a fun CTF with interesting challenges. The categories were : OSINT, Misc, Web, Forensic, Pwn, Reverse, Programming, Intro and Crypto. I managed to get to the 18th place. The challenge In this challenge, we were tasked to retrieve the admin’s credentials. This was done by exploiting a CQL injection. Here’s the description :
